content_body: The entire trip was a blast! We really enjoyed the pontoon boat rentals and Dahlonega. We cooked several wonderful dinners and breakfasts. This was a memorable trip for our entire family. We usually are more into tropical vacations but this rocked!!  Strongly recommend Blue Ridge Lake Pontoon Rental.  So many exciting places to see and the people are so nice and social. Great cabin and great vacation!
title: Mountain Vacation Wins vs. Tropical Vacation
